identity.name: Draven Frost
identity.background: Ex-rebel soldier from the losing side, carrying guilt. Reformed military with tech skills. Would do anything to keep the crew safe and fed.

edge.name: Guardian Instinct
edge.description: Once per session, intercept an attack meant for an ally and take the hit instead.

personal_item.name: Rebel Insignia
personal_item.description: A tarnished rebel insignia he keeps in his vest pocket. A reminder of who he used to be.

the_question: Can I ever balance the scales for what I've done?
flaw: Will protect crew even at cost of collateral damage. If you get in his way, it'll cause problems.
notes: Proficient with pulse rifles and shotguns. Can pilot almost anything in the galaxy.
